title: List Step Types Response
description: Response format for the list_step_types MCP tool. Returns metadata for all step types, optionally filtered by category and/or tags.

typeId.description: Unique identifier matching Kettle's internal step name

category.description: Functional category of the step type

description.description: Action-oriented description of step purpose and common use cases
examples: Read data from a database table using SQL queries. Supports parameterized queries, connection pooling, and result set streaming.

tags.description: Capability keywords from standardized taxonomy enabling discovery

examples.description: Read data from a database table using SQL queries. Supports parameterized queries, connection pooling, and result set streaming for efficient data extraction.
Select, rename, reorder, or remove fields from the data stream. Core transformation step for data shaping and schema mapping.
Write data to text files (CSV, TSV, fixed-width). Supports compression, encoding options, and header configuration.
